serve_drinks.name: Serve the patrons
serve_drinks.msg: You work the room for an hour — refills, a spilled pint, a brief argument about a game of cards. Krelm nods once when you hand over the coin pouch.

bonus.msg: A regular at the corner table slides an extra coin across without looking up. You pocket it.

clean_tables.name: Clean and tidy
clean_tables.msg: Tables scrubbed, ashes swept, floor less bad than it was. Krelm says nothing, which you're learning to read as approval.

talk_to_patrons.name: Talk to patrons
talk_to_patrons.msg: You drift between the tables, learning names and remembering faces. Small talk. The slow work of being liked.

rest_at_inn.name: Rest for the night
rest_at_inn.msg: You climb to room three and sleep without dreaming. By morning the candle stub has burned out entirely.

sell_berries.name: Sell berries to Krelm
sell_berries.msg: Krelm weighs the berries in his palm, counts silently, and slides you eight coin. 'Don't bruise them next time,' he says.

do_pushups.name: Do pushups
do_pushups.msg: Pushups on the uneven floorboards until your arms give out. The wood is cold. You don't stop until you have to.

gather_berries.name: Search for berries
gather_berries.msg: You push into the undergrowth, hands cold, watching for the blue glint among the roots. An hour later you've filled your pockets. The forest makes no sound as you leave.

move_boulder.name: Move the boulder
move_boulder.msg: You plant your feet and push. The boulder grinds, resists, then gives. A narrow path opens beyond it into the deep Eldergrove. Something in your pack shifts loose — you'll take stock later.

gather_rare_berries.name: Gather silverberries
gather_rare_berries.msg: The silverberries come away from the stems easily, as if they were waiting. You fill your pockets twice over.
